# mtncloud_instance_type (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud instance type by code.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_instance_type" "ubuntu" {
  code = "MTN-CS10"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `code` (String) Code of the instance type to look up (e.g. `MTN-CS10`).

### Read-Only

- `default_layout_id` (Number) ID of the instance type's default layout, used when provisioning instances.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the instance type.
- `name` (String) Display name of the instance type.
